title: Macron Warns Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire 'Already Undermined'
detail: French President Emmanuel Macron expressed serious alarm that the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is 'already undermined', warning of fragile implementation on the ground and calling for stronger international oversight to prevent collapse of the agreement.

media.caption: Macron warns Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is already being undermined

title: Israel Conducts 'Massive' Demolitions in South Lebanon Despite Ceasefire
detail: Israel carried out large-scale demolition operations in south Lebanon despite the active ceasefire agreement, drawing widespread international condemnation and raising fears of a full collapse of the fragile truce brokered months earlier.

media.caption: Israel conducts demolitions in south Lebanon in violation of ceasefire terms
